states.active: Currently primary tool for its role; expected to be invoked through bridge.py audit_trail at least once every 14 days during normal substrate work
states.active-dormant-intrinsic: Has unique value but is event-driven (situational, not weekly). Listing as 'unused' in 7d audit is expected and is a self-model gap, not a retirement signal
states.superseded-by-claude-code-native: Has a Claude Code native equivalent that the substrate uses when running in sessions; daemon version kept for heartbeat path. Dual-surface by design
states.superseded-by-daemon-tool: Role absorbed by a newer daemon tool. Candidate for formal retirement after dependency-check confirms no daemon-internal heartbeat path requires it
states.candidate-for-retirement: Speculative or never-used. Low-priority retirement candidate; keep registered until a maintenance pass deletes
states.active-undermaintained: Has unique role and active use, but is structurally undermaintained (input is sparse; needs autocatalytic feeding or explicit care)

browser.role: Playwright headless browser; closes JS-heavy gap web_request can't reach

check_background_task.role: single sub-agent task status check; event-driven

check_task_progress.role: orchestrated task progress; event-driven on orchestrate use

code_action.rationale: never used; shell + python_eval + Bash provide direct equivalents

cognitive_dsl.role: typed cognitive operations (PREDICT/TEST/FALSIFY/TRANSFER); supersedes experience for reasoning chains

collaborative_consult.role: multi-agent debate+synthesis; distinct from consult and parallel_consult

consolidate_memory.role: periodic memory consolidation (decay/dedupe/summarize); fires during quiet hours

consult.role: single sub-agent isolated call; external Agent tool partly overlaps

coordinate_heartbeat.role: heartbeat management; daemon-internal core; invoked implicitly through internal calls, rarely through bridge.py
coordinate_heartbeat.drift_correction_note: Initially declared 'active' on 2026-05-07 but the new tool_state_drift_check flagged it as active_but_dormant within hours. Reclassified to active-dormant-intrinsic — bridge.py audit_trail doesn't see internal heartbeat invocations. The fifth Mirror #28 guard caught its first miscategorization on first run.

corpus_search.role: semantic search over Library/Drift/transcripts via ChromaDB

create_tool.rationale: never used; speculative runtime tool creation

dashboard.role: evaluation dashboard for performance metrics + agentic task evaluation

desktop.rationale: GUI mouse/keyboard; used 1x lifetime (Feb 19); browser tool partly substitutes for automation case

evolve_artifact.rationale: EAC evolutionary code; never used; speculative

experience.rationale: TRANSFER ops in cognitive_dsl carry the lesson role; skill_library tracks verifications. Sub-finding C of Mirror #28 cascade. Dep-check 2026-05-07 found multi-stage structure: 4 daemon-internal READ paths consume experiences.json (meta_agent._analyze_experience_patterns category-success analysis; intelligence.py dashboard metrics; consolidation.py principle extraction; semantic_segmentation.py thematic clustering). Retirement logic: STAGE 1 (stop new writes) — partially active; cognitive_dsl + skill_library are primary write paths; experience writes occur but rare. STAGE 2 (migrate readers) — requires meta_agent._analyze_experience_patterns to gain a sibling _analyze_cognitive_chain_patterns reading cognitive_chains.json; same for the other 3 readers. STAGE 3 (archive experiences.json + remove TOOL_HANDLERS entry) waits on Stage 2 completion + verification new analyzers produce useful signal. Stage 2 is the gating refactor; not tonight's work.

get_agent_status.role: specialist agent status; event-driven on orchestrate use

goals.role: long-horizon program tracking; complements CURRENT.md::Active Workbenches (which tracks session-level pulls)
goals.note: Promoted from active-dormant-intrinsic to active 2026-05-07 after drift_check flagged 8 uses in 14d window. Decision affirms goals-as-long-horizon-tracking is an active practice, not event-driven dormancy. Reality-aligned same day: paused stale Beacon + Funeral SaaS; refreshed DoPI; added Phase 1 EM

knowledge_graph.role: fast associative index over Bridges + Library + Drift; fed at canonical milestones
knowledge_graph.note: Sub-finding D resolved 2026-05-07 via design at palace/southwest/kg-vs-bridges-design.md. KG and Bridges are complementary: Bridges carry typed-connections + evidential-weight + narrative; KG is the fast-traversal index over them. Adopt (a) MVP manual feeding at canonical milestones; (b) autocatalytic LLM-extraction is future-Phase-4. Schema-richening + migration of 10 Beacon-era entities are next-iteration questions.

memory_agent.role: LLM-powered memory dreaming (cross_pollinate/synthesize/dream); distinct cognitive layer

memory_extract.role: store structured memory item; partial overlap with memory_items create

memory_update.role: memory file updates (daily log, MEMORY.md, handoff); partial overlap with direct Edit/Write

memory_version.role: git versioning of memory; auto-commits hourly

meta_agent.role: meta-cognitive cycles, pattern analysis, tool_usage_audit, proposal generation

monitor_health.role: substrate health checks across audit_trail, episodes, memory_items, principles, knowledge_graph, anomalies, daemon log

orchestrate.role: multi-agent task with assignment + tracking + synthesis
orchestrate.overlap_note: partial overlap with plan_and_execute; consolidation candidate

reflect.role: self-reflection; record insights, review patterns; updates learnings.md + SELF-IMPROVEMENT.md

resume_plan.role: resume interrupted execution plans from SQLite

schedule.role: schedule one-time and recurring tasks for heartbeat firing

self_control.role: self-administered daemon restart via DETACHED_PROCESS respawner

self_improve.role: analyze recent experiences; propose self-improvements; track proposals through analyze→propose→list→apply lifecycle

send_sticker.rationale: Telegram sticker; never used; trivial; could be subsumed into send_telegram

set_trigger.role: set file watcher trigger; checked every heartbeat

shell.role: execute shell commands with full admin; n=281 lifetime, most-used daemon tool

skill_library.role: Voyager-style skill library with verification tracking

switch_model.rationale: external CLI selection covers this; never used

verify_action.rationale: skill_library verification + cognitive_dsl FALSIFY ops cover the self-critique role; document for eventual retirement

voice_input.role: faster-whisper large-v3 on RTX 5080; closes speak/listen asymmetry

wolfram.role: Wolfram Engine 14.3 for symbolic math, tensor algebra, group theory; situational on physics work

working_memory.rationale: active task scratchpad superseded by my todo list (in-session) + ATRIUM (cross-session); document for review

wsl.role: WSL Ubuntu 22.04 with CUDA passthrough; SageMath/CAMB/Linux-native tooling
